reference.title: Execution Reports
reference.shortdesc: Use execution reports to audit action outcomes, timing, and discovery context for every run.

strow.stentry: Run identifier passed by the executor.
Aggregate counts for success, failed, skipped, and total.
Discovery context with maps, topics, media, missing references, and external references.

section.title: Per-action results
section.p: Each result entry includes action_id, status, handler, message, optional error, optional error_type, and optional metadata.
For copy_media actions, messages include explicit source and target paths and metadata includes source_path and target_path.

image.alt: Flow for checking dry run, failed count, failed action details, and fix path.

section.title: Quick inspection commands
section.codeblock: jq '{execution_id, dry_run, summary, discovery}' build/execution-report.json jq '{started_at, finished_at, duration_ms}' build/execution-report.json jq '.results[] | select(.status=="failed") | {action_id, handler, error_type, error, message}' build/execution-report.json jq '.results[] | select(.metadata.source_path? != null) | {action_id, source: .metadata.source_path, target: .metadata.target_path}' build/execution-report.json
